channel.title: Meta on 7own's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Meta on 7own's blog

item.title: Hello World
item.description:
Welcome to my blog! This is the first post — more content coming soon.

What to expect

This blog will cover topics like:

  • Software engineering & architecture
  • Security research
  • Tools & workflows
  • Anything else I find worth writing about

Stay tuned.
